info.title: Svg.Skia.Converter
info.description: An SVG to encoded bitmap image converter.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Converts SVG and Android VectorDrawable files to SVG or encoded bitmap output.

options.name: inputFiles
options.description: The relative or absolute path to the input files

options.name: inputDirectory
options.description: The relative or absolute path to the input directory

options.name: outputDirectory
options.description: The relative or absolute path to the output directory

options.name: outputFiles
options.description: The relative or absolute path to the output files

options.name: pattern
options.description: The search string to match against the names of files in the input directory

options.name: scale
options.description: The output image horizontal and vertical scaling factor [default: 1]

options.name: scaleX
options.description: The output image horizontal scaling factor [default: 1]

options.name: scaleY
options.description: The output image vertical scaling factor [default: 1]

options.name: systemLanguage
options.description: The system language name as defined in BCP 47

options.name: load-config
options.description: The relative or absolute path to the config file

options.name: save-config
options.description: The relative or absolute path to the config file
